docket_entries.description: AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CHAU, MICHAEL
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: FORAN, MARY JANE SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR CHAU, MICHAEL
MOTION TO CONTINUE COURT TRIAL, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT CHAU, HUNG CHAU, SUIKU HO HEARING SET FOR JUN-09-2000 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 206
TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 503

JUDGE JOSEPH DESMOND, K.LEE/CLERK, P.DOWLING/CSR CAUSE CALLED FOR TRIAL BY COURT. MICHAEL JOHNSTON FOR THE PLTF. CATHY MOSBRUCKER FOR THE DEFT MICHAEL CHAU. THOMAS DROHAN FOR THE DEFTS, HUNG CHAU AND SUIKU CHAU. WITNESSES S&E AND EXHIBITS IDENTIFIED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE. THE COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETERS FOR THE CANTONESES LANGUAGE FOR BOTH SIDES ARE DOROTHY WONG AND MARY SO. DEFTS MAKE MOTIONS FOR JUDGMENT. COURT GRANTS MOTIONS. EXHIBITS RETURNED. THE COURT ORDERS THE DEFTS TO PREPARE THE JUDGMENTS.
